hero.title: Meeting Minutes AI
hero.description: Turn meeting notes and transcripts into clear summaries, decisions, and actionable next steps.

differences.title: Move from discussion to action
differences.description: Meeting Minutes AI keeps the useful outcomes of a meeting easy to understand and follow.

items.title: Meeting context
items.description: Keep meeting purpose, participants, and status in one record.

items.title: Transcript clarity
items.description: Capture source notes before separating decisions and actions.

items.title: Follow-up ownership
items.description: Track next steps, owners, and due dates after the meeting.

feel.title: A cleaner handoff after every meeting
feel.description: The workflow helps teams leave discussions with shared clarity.

items.title: Capture the discussion
items.description: Bring meeting notes and transcripts into one place.

items.title: Confirm next steps
items.description: Separate action items from the raw discussion.

items.title: Review outcomes
items.description: Use the summary and decision notes as the final record.

audiences.title: Who uses Meeting Minutes AI
audiences.description: Useful for teams that need reliable meeting follow-through.

items.title: Project teams
items.description: Track decisions and next steps across active work.

items.title: Client teams
items.description: Prepare clear records of discussions and commitments.

resourceSection.title: Meeting records that stay useful
resourceSection.description: Keep outcomes organized for later review and follow-up.

items.title: Meeting summaries
items.description: Maintain a concise record of the discussion.

items.title: Action lists
items.description: Track next steps, owners, and follow-up.

groupedSection.title: Organize meeting outcomes
groupedSection.description: Separate information by what the team needs next.

items.name: Notes
items.description: Capture the important parts of the discussion.

items.name: Transcript
items.description: Preserve raw meeting text when needed.

items.name: Tasks
items.description: List the work that needs to happen next.

items.name: Owners
items.description: Keep responsibility for each action clear.

technicalSection.title: Built as App #024
technicalSection.description: Meeting Minutes AI follows the shared Ansiversa mini-app architecture.
items: User-scoped backend records across MeetingMinutesMeetings, MeetingMinutesNotes, MeetingMinutesActionItems, and MeetingMinutesSummaries.
Protected typed API workflow with generated frontend OpenAPI types.

finalCta.title: Ready to turn notes into next steps?
finalCta.description: Open Meeting Minutes AI and organize the outcomes of your next meeting.
